spec_match.rationale: The page now shows named inline module declarations, shadow-root adoption specifiers, shared CSSStyleSheet identity, and an explicit missing-specifier fallback path.

interactive.rationale: Theme, density, badge variant, and adoption-probe controls visibly update the component library and runtime readout.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The concept still demonstrates a reusable component library built from named shared style modules.

edge_cases.rationale: The adoption probe includes a missing-specifier scenario and reports the fallback behavior instead of only showing the happy path.

references.rationale: The references section cites chromestatus.com/feature/4790543041298432 and the relevant WHATWG proposal.

design_system.rationale: Local button background overrides pair color declarations, visible demo styles use shared CSS variables, and raw color fallbacks were removed.

summary: The component library now has real controls, a runtime adoption probe, corrected ChromeStatus references, and a clear constructed-stylesheet fallback simulation for browsers without declarative CSS module support.
